_comment: Tuning knobs for the risk/TOS + gambling/economy systems. WS-C owns this file; WS-D reads the audit* keys (read-only). Values are satirical stand-ins for platform policy pressure.
_sponsor: Stake-slot requirement. graceTicks -> first soft warning; failTicks -> sponsor pulls out (hard fail).
_economy: engagementScale tunes the canonical per-tick engagement formula down to fit the 2500 quota (see CONTRACTS.md §2 contract-change log). Jackpot engagement is also multiplied by engagementScale so all engagement stays on one scale; jackpot money is not.
_payout: End-of-shift money = jackpot winnings (accrued in-shift) + salary + quotaClearBonus - penaltyPerTosBreak*breaks, reputation-weighted salary.
_difficulty: Each cleared shift compounds quota, authored stream risk rates, AND stream viewers (S3.0 audience inflation — supply grows with demand so the curve is a gradient, not the old shift-6 wall). wonAtShift: clearing this shift = victory (phase 'won'); endless continues after. Three public TOS breaks in one shift is an immediate firing.
